_comment: Naming enforcement hook — disabled by default. To enable, remove the leading underscore from '_PreToolUse' to make it 'PreToolUse'. See README.md § Setup › Optional: Enable Naming Enforcement Hook.

hooks.prompt: Check whether the file being written is a governed document (not source code, not infrastructure-exempt). A governed document is any file in the project's tracked_dirs (typically docs/) with extensions like .md, .docx, .pdf, .html, .pptx, .xlsx, .yaml, .json, .sh. If it IS a governed document, validate the filename against the naming convention: descriptive-name-YYYYMMDD-VX.Y.ext. If the filename does NOT match, respond with a JSON object: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Filename does not follow naming convention. Expected: descriptive-name-YYYYMMDD-VX.Y.ext"}. If the filename matches OR the file is not a governed document, respond with: {"decision": "approve", "reason": "OK"}.
